mode.backupDescription: Everything as importable JSON in one zip, indexed by a manifest — for restoring or migrating later.
mode.reportDescription: Pick a format for each tool — PDF, spreadsheet, Markdown, or calendar — bundled in one zip.

backup.overRowLimit: This export exceeds the size limit — exclude some tools to continue.
backup.overUploadLimit: Uploaded files exceed the {{limit}} limit — exclude uploads to continue.

report.documentOthersNote: Whiteboards and links export as JSON; uploaded files ride along unchanged.

confirm.note: The export runs in the background — you can keep working and we'll notify you when it's ready.

progress.title: Preparing your export…
progress.note: This can take a while. You can close this dialog — the download arrives as a notification, and finished exports can be re-downloaded from guild settings.

done.title: Export ready
done.note: Your download has started. You can re-download it from guild settings until it expires.

failed.title: Export failed
failed.note: Nothing was exported. Try again, or narrow what's included.

entry.guildDescription: Download every initiative's data as an importable backup or an à-la-carte report. Sharing rules apply: the export contains what you can see.
entry.initiativeDescription: Download this initiative's data as an importable backup or an à-la-carte report. Sharing rules apply: the export contains what you can see.

table.title: Recent exports
table.description: Finished exports can be re-downloaded until they expire (7 days). Guild admins see every member's exports.
